seoTitle: Terms of Service | Palm & Light Coffee
seoDescription: Review the terms that govern use of the Palm & Light Coffee website and related services.
title: Terms of Service
intro: By accessing or using this website, you agree to the following terms.

sections.title: Use of Site
sections.body1: You agree to use this site for lawful purposes only.
sections.body2: You may not misuse the website, attempt to gain unauthorized access, or interfere with site functionality.

sections.title: Products & Services
sections.body1: All products and services are subject to availability.
sections.body2: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue offerings and adjust pricing at any time.

sections.title: Gift Cards
sections.body1: Gift cards are processed through Square and subject to Square’s terms and conditions.
sections.body2: Please review Square’s policies for additional details related to gift card purchases and redemption.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body1: All content on this site—including text, images, branding, and design—is the property of Palm & Light Coffee unless otherwise noted.
sections.body2: You may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written consent, except where allowed by law.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body1: Palm & Light Coffee is not liable for indirect or incidental damages, loss of data or business interruption.
sections.body2: This includes issues arising from third-party services connected to or referenced on this website.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.body1: This site may include links to third-party services.
sections.body2: We are not responsible for their content, policies, or practices.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
sections.body1: We may update these terms at any time.
sections.body2: Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of any changes.
